data.title: Green Brick Partners, Inc. will release Q4 financial results on Feb 25, 2026, with an earnings call hosted by CEO Jim Brickman.
data.description: Plano, Texas-based Green Brick Partners, Inc. (NYSE: GRBK), recognized as the third largest homebuilder in the Dallas-Fort Worth area, and listed among Fortune Magazine’s fastest growing companies in 2024, will divulge its financial performance for the fourth quarter concluding on December 31, 2025, following the market closure on February 25, 2026. CEO Jim Brickman will lead an earnings conference call to review the results at 12:00 p.m. Eastern Time on Thursday.

data.title: Circle CEO dismisses fears of bank runs from stablecoin yields at WEF, cites money market funds and finance trends.
data.description: During the World Economic Forum, Jeremy Allaire, the CEO of Circle, dismissed concerns about stablecoin yields potentially causing bank runs. He highlighted examples like money market funds and significant changes in the finance sector to support his argument.

data.title: Enviri Corporation (NYSE: NVRI) named to Corporate Knights’ 2026 Global 100 Most Sustainable Corporations in the World.
data.description: On January 22, 2026, Enviri Corporation (NYSE: NVRI), known for offering environmental solutions for industrial and specialty waste streams, disclosed its inclusion in Corporate Knights’ 2026 Global 100 Most Sustainable Corporations in the World list. The announcement was made during the World Economic Forum held in Davos, Switzerland. This marks Enviri's debut on the Global 100 list, signifying its recognition as a top sustainable corporation worldwide.

data.title: Independent Bank Corp made $18.6M in Q4 2025 (EPS $0.89), $68.5M for 2025 (EPS $3.27). Board authorized 5% stock repurchase plan.
data.description: Independent Bank Corporation, based in Grand Rapids, Michigan, announced its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2025. The company reported a net income of $18.6 million, or $0.89 per diluted share, for this quarter, slightly higher than the $18.5 million, or $0.87 per diluted share, recorded in the same period the previous year. For the entire year ending on December 31, 2025, Independent Bank Corporation reported a net income of $68.5 million, or $3.27 per diluted share, showing an increase from the $66.8 million, or $3.16 per diluted share, reported in 2024.
Abacus Global Management to join conference soon.

data.title: Premier Air Charter buys Citation X, second major expansion, OTCID: PREM.
data.description: Today, OTCID: PREM disclosed the acquisition of a Citation X as part of its fleet, representing the company's second significant fleet expansion move in the past few months.

data.title: DIRTT had strong December commercial activity with customers shifting from planning to execution in healthcare, public sector, and workplace sectors.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta on January 22, 2026, DIRTT Environmental Solutions Ltd. (referred to as "DIRTT" or "the Company") provided an update on its progress. As a notable player in industrialized construction, DIRTT (TSX: DRT; OTCQX: DRTTF) witnessed ongoing positive developments leading into the end of the year. The company reported a shift towards action as customers progressed from the planning phase to implementation. Notably, there was heightened activity in various sectors including healthcare, public services, and corporate workspaces, indicating a broad spectrum of engagement.

data.title: Catheter Precision gets first LockeT order in Germany from Universitätsklinikum Frankfurt, marking entry into German market.
data.description: On January 22, 2026, in Fort Mill, South Carolina, Catheter Precision, Inc. (VTAK - NYSE/American), a leading medical device company in the US specializing in advanced products for the cardiac electrophysiology sector, revealed the reception of a purchase order for their LockeT product from Universitätsklinikum Frankfurt (Frankfurt University Hospital). This development signifies LockeT's introduction into the German market, marking a significant milestone for the company.

M6 earthquake hits NEAR EAST COAST OF KAMCHATKA

data.title: Wipfli partners with Creatio to offer scalable CRM and workflow solutions. New alliance announced on Jan. 22, 2026.
data.description: A recent collaboration between Wipfli, a prominent accounting and advisory firm, and Creatio has introduced innovative CRM and workflow solutions tailored for middle-market businesses seeking rapid outcomes. This new alliance, established in Milwaukee on January 22, 2026, aims to deliver scalable and efficient tools for enhancing operational efficiency. By combining Wipfli's expertise with Creatio's technology, clients can expect streamlined processes and optimized customer interactions. This partnership is poised to revolutionize the way businesses approach CRM and workflow automation, promising significant benefits for companies looking to accelerate their growth.

data.title: Plus Therapeutics updates on REYOBIQ™ clinical program and CNSide® commercialization; expands license in Pennsylvania.
data.description: CNSide is broadening its clinical license scope in Pennsylvania. This expansion enables the company to offer advanced clinical services across the state. The license now covers a wider range of specialties and treatments, increasing accessibility for Pennsylvania residents seeking CNSide's expertise. This move is part of CNSide's strategy to reach more patients and enhance its impact in the healthcare sector. With this development, CNSide aims to cater to a larger population and deliver specialized care to those in need.

data.title: Athene to host Fixed Income Investor Call on Feb 19, 2026, at 10:00AM ET. Subsidiary of Apollo Global Management.
data.description: Athene, a company under Apollo Global Management, Inc. (NYSE: APO), based in West Des Moines, Iowa, revealed plans to hold a Fixed Income Investor Call on February 19, 2026. The call is scheduled for 10:00 AM Eastern Time.

data.title: Gen Z favors crypto over banks for trust, seeking control & access. Their habits influence housing policies.
data.description: According to recent consumer research, trust in cryptocurrencies is influenced by the level of control and access users have, with their behavior now affecting decisions made in the housing sector. The study indicates that a significant number of individuals are more inclined to trust and invest in crypto assets when they have greater control over their funds and easier access to trading platforms. This shift in consumer sentiment towards cryptocurrencies has begun to impact housing policies as well.

data.title: Research cautions against mistaking BTC selling pattern for past occurrences; long-term holders (>2 years) peaked in 2024-2025.
data.description: In 2024 and 2025, a new analysis revealed that a record number of Bitcoin holders who have owned the cryptocurrency for two years or longer participated in the bull market.

data.title: S&T Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: STBA) reported Q4 2025 net income of $34.0M, $0.89 per share, and full-year 2025 net income of $134.2M, $3.49 per share. Strong return metrics with ROA of 1.37%, ROE of 9.13%, ROTE of 12.30% in Q4. Total assets were $9.9B at Dec 31, 2025, with total deposits increasing by $36.9M. Earnings call scheduled for Jan 22, 2026, and new $100M share repurchase program authorized. For full financial data, visit Benzinga.com.
data.description: S&T Bancorp, Inc. (NASDAQ: STBA) reported its fourth quarter and full year 2025 earnings, including a net income of $34.0 million for Q4 2025, with earnings per diluted share at $0.89. This compared to $35.0 million and $0.91 in Q3 2025 and $33.1 million and $0.86 in Q4 2024. Full year 2025 had a net income of $134.2 million compared to $131.3 million in 2024, with EPS at $3.49 for 2025 compared to $3.41 in 2024. The company demonstrated strong return metrics, with ROA at 1.37%, ROE at 9.13%, and ROTE at 12.30% for Q4 2025. Total portfolio loans increased by $91.0 million, total deposits increased by $36.9 million, and NPAs were at $55.6 million. The company also announced a new $100 million share repurchase program. The earnings call was scheduled for January 22, 2026. S&T Bancorp, Inc. is a $9.9 billion bank holding company headquartered in Indiana, Pennsylvania, and trades on the NASDAQ Global Select Market under the symbol STBA.(Note: The full story includes more details about specific financial data, forward-looking statements, and financial measures. These details were not included in the summary for brevity.)

data.title: Hansa Biopharma wins 2025 SwedenBIO Award at SwedenBIO Summit on Jan 21, 2026, in Stockholm.
data.description: Hansa Biopharma AB, a company listed on Nasdaq Stockholm under the ticker symbol HNSA, has recently won the esteemed 2025 SwedenBIO Award. The announcement was made in Lund, Sweden on January 22, 2026. The award was presented during the SwedenBIO Summit in Stockholm on January 21. Hansa was honored with this award at the event, which recognizes significant contributions to the biopharmaceutical industry.

data.title: Europe holds significant leverage over the US economy post-trade tensions, aiming to demonstrate strength to the Trump admin.
data.description: Following recent trade tensions with the United States, European leaders are working to demonstrate resilience in the face of criticism from the Trump administration, who perceive them as lacking in strength.

data.title: TMC USA applied for a commercial recovery permit area of 65,000 km2 for deep-sea mining in the Pacific Ocean.
data.description: In New York on Jan. 22, 2026, TMC the metals company Inc. (Nasdaq: TMC) revealed that its U.S. subsidiary, The Metals Company USA LLC, has presented a combined request to the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA) for an exploration license and commercial recovery permit. The permit is intended for the extraction of polymetallic nodules found in international waters within the Clarion Clipperton Zone (CCZ) located in the Pacific Ocean. TMC is recognized as a prominent developer of critical metals crucial to various sectors including energy, defense, manufacturing, and infrastructure.

data.title: Trigon Metals to change name to Safi Silver Corp, hold AGM on March 5, 2026, focusing on silver and base metal exploration in Morocco. Management changes announced along with warrant repricing.
data.description: Trigon Metals Inc. (TSX-V: TM; OTCQB: PNTZF) has revealed that on March 5, 2026, they will hold their Annual General Meeting for shareholders. During this meeting, a significant vote will take place to alter the company's name to Safi Silver Corp. This signifies Trigon's shift towards a more concentrated approach as a financially strong entity exploring silver and base metals in Morocco. Alongside this change, Trigon has disclosed updates regarding its management and leadership teams. Additionally, the company intends to reprice warrants as part of its strategic adjustments.
